exploration_notes: Traced the LLVM new pass manager registration and execution flow: (1) PassManager template is defined in llvm/include/llvm/IR/PassManager.h with the addPass() method for adding passes and the run() method for executing them. (2) PassRegistry (legacy infrastructure) is defined in llvm/include/llvm/PassRegistry.h with implementation in llvm/lib/IR/PassRegistry.cpp. (3) For the new PM, pass registration happens via PassBuilder (llvm/include/llvm/Passes/PassBuilder.h, llvm/lib/Passes/PassBuilder.cpp
